name: TraderTrac
description_short: AI-powered trading journal with psychological analysis, pattern detection, and automated performance reports at an affordable price.
description_long:
TraderTrac is a modern trading journal built for retail traders who want AI-powered insights without the premium price tag. Unlike legacy journals that simply log trades, TraderTrac uses advanced AI to analyze your trading psychology, detect behavioral patterns, and generate weekly performance reports automatically.

The platform supports stocks, options, futures, and forex with automatic P&L calculation, win rate tracking, and detailed analytics dashboards. The AI coach offers five analysis modes including pattern detection, psychological profiling, risk assessment, market context analysis, and comprehensive journal reviews.

TraderTrac stands out for its generous free tier (5 AI credits per month), clean modern interface, and the fact that it costs roughly 75% less than competitors like TradeZella or Edgewonk while offering more AI capabilities.
pros: AI-powered psychological analysis unique in this price range
Generous free tier with 5 AI credits per month
Clean, modern interface with dark mode
cons: No broker integration for auto-import yet
Smaller community compared to established players
meta_description: AI-powered trading journal with psychological analysis, pattern detection, and automated performance reports at an affordable price.
